OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: IPGetPNCRelatedToServiceAccount

omniProcessElements.name: DMTGetPNCRelatedToServiceAccount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "currentOffsetValue" : "%SV_SetOffsetValue:offSetValue%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "GetPNCRelatedToServiceAccount", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: DMTransformPNCRelatedToServiceAccount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "pncRecords" : "=%DMTGetPNCRelatedToServiceAccount:pncRecords%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMTransformPNCRelatedToServiceAccount", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: RA_PNCRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "pncRecords" : "=%DMTransformPNCRelatedToServiceAccount%", "currentOffsetValue" : "%SV_SetOffsetValue:offSetValue%", "disablePrev" : "=IF(%SV_SetOffsetValue:offSetValue% == 0,true,false)", "disableNext" : "=IF(%SV_SetOffsetValue:totalRecords%-%SV_SetOffsetValue:offSetValue% <=5 OR %SV_SetOffsetValue:totalRecords% <=5,true,false)" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "DMTransformPNCRelatedToServiceAccount", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SV_SetOffsetValue
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "offSetValue" : "=IF(%selectedAction% == \"next\",%currentOffsetValue%+5,IF(%selectedAction% == \"prev\",%currentOffsetValue%-5,0))", "totalRecords" : "=COUNTQUERY(\"SELECT COUNT() FROM ProviderNetworkContract WHERE Contract.Status != 'Canceled' AND Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.AccountId = '{0}'\", %ContextId%)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
